overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character walking through a rainy urban night environment. The character navigates wet sidewalks and crosses busy intersections populated with vintage-style vehicles and pedestrians, with neon signs and streetlights illuminating the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with storefronts and street vendors

events.description: pedestrians with umbrellas pass by on the left side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a brick building, passing groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking in the same direction
vintage sedan driving past with headlights on

entered.detail: multi-story brick building with illuminated windows running along the right side of the street
large illuminated billboard visible in the distance above the street
tall street lamp casting light on the wet pavement
stack of wooden barrels on the sidewalk near the building corner
wooden utility pole with overhead power lines

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-slicked urban sidewalk at night, passing pedestrians and vintage vehicles. A tall brick building lines the right side while street lamps illuminate the wet concrete, with a distant billboard visible ahead through the light rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk approaching major intersection with parked vehicles

events.description: blue vintage van drives past and parks on the right side of the street
red station wagon and beige pickup truck pass by on the street

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past various parked and moving vehicles, approaching the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: blue vintage van parked on the street side

entered.detail: red newspaper vending machine on the sidewalk
metal public trash receptacle on the sidewalk
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past parked vintage cars and newspaper stands as the crosswalk approaches. The utility poles and distant billboard grow larger while pedestrians walk in the opposite direction, and the rain continues to fall on the exposed sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with tram tracks and multiple traffic lanes

events.description: character steps off the curb and begins crossing the multi-lane intersection
navigating through dense traffic including white vans and yellow cars at the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while weaving between moving vehicles and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: green vintage station wagon waiting at the intersection
pedestrian standing at the corner waiting to cross

entered.detail: expansive road intersection with multiple lanes and tram tracks embedded in the asphalt
tall traffic signal pole with suspended lights over the intersection
metal railway tracks embedded in the road surface crossing the intersection
low-rise industrial brick building with large windows on the left side of the intersection
illuminated gas station sign visible in the distance beyond the intersection
red fire hydrant on the sidewalk corner

segments.scene_description: The character enters the wide intersection, navigating between moving vintage cars and tram tracks while crossing to the opposite side. Industrial buildings become visible on the left and a gas station sign glows in the distance, with traffic lights overhead and the rain creating reflections on the asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street corner with gas station and warehouse buildings

events.description: reaching the opposite sidewalk and continuing past industrial buildings
white van and yellow car pass by on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past industrial warehouses and the gas station area

entered.detail: industrial warehouse building at the street corner with metal siding

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character continues along the sidewalk past industrial buildings and warehouses. The gas station sign is now closer and more prominent on the left, while traffic continues to flow on the right side of the street in the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked urban district that transitions from a pedestrian sidewalk into a wide, industrial intersection. It begins by tracking a character walking past a tall brick building and vintage vehicles, with street lamps casting a glow over the wet concrete. As the character advances, the perspective shifts toward a distant billboard and newspaper stands before the scene opens up into a broad crossing filled with tram tracks and moving traffic. The camera then navigates through the intersection, where the lighting shifts to include the glow of a distant gas station sign and reflections on the asphalt. Finally, the movement continues past industrial warehouses and the now-prominent gas station as the character reaches the opposite sidewalk under the persistent night rain.
